| CU-003 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment; first dose given 2026-03-27 |

On the PK models:

- Fact: I reviewed the dosing config, not model validation logs or runtime outputs.
- Fact: The dosing file looks current and internally consistent.
- Inference: Patient-status notes look reassuring for CU-001 and CU-002; CU-003 is too newly enrolled to call stable from this file alone.
- So: I can’t honestly confirm overall PK model stability from this check alone.

If you want, I can next look for recent PK validation or monitoring files and give you a proper stability check.
